target: SEC-6.6 (The Accuracy Claim) — SUPERSEDED BY EXP-166
reason: This expansion was drafted in a later analyst run (same day) for the same two assigned-analyst issues (ISS-1033, ISS-1034) on SEC-6.6. At draft time the prior analyst run's output — EXP-166, ready-for-integration at 2026-04-15T08:13:16.974Z — was not visible via the mode-dispatch checks (expansion-tracker.json was not yet updated and processed-proposals.json was only checked after write). Both expansions address the same two issues with the same analytical structure: lead with endpoint-disagreement (4 different accuracy figures from the dome's own APIs) to close the 'every journal hardcodes stats' defense of ISS-1033, and add a retroactive-reclassification preempt citing W019/W020/W024/W027 to close the 'CERN excludes preliminary runs' defense of ISS-1034. EXP-166 is authoritative. The decider should integrate EXP-166 and close both issues accordingly; EXP-167 is orphaned here only because the FUSE workspace does not support unlink().
note_for_decider: Do NOT apply EXP-167. Apply EXP-166. This file is a tombstone.
